nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mountain masked apalis
nodes.summary: The mountain masked apalis (Apalis personata), also known as the black-faced apalis, is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests. It was first described in 1902. References

nodes.name: Apalis
nodes.summary: Apalis（Apalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联25种鸟类，如Bar-throated apalis、Taita apalis、Yellow-throated apalis等25种鸟类。

nodes.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
nodes.summary: Albertine Rift montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联44种鸟类，包括Barred long-tailed cuckoo、白枕鸽、Albertine owlet等44种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mountain masked apalis
nodes.summary: Mountain masked apalis（Apalis personata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mountain masked apalis。

nodes.name: 动物界
